notes: Simple linkless confirm from 2LK. Not the best Cammy can get, but probably the best you can get without a slightly harder route.
2LK > 2LP gives Cammy links into 2MK, which gives her this simple damage increase. A good confirm combo from 2LK in general.
2LP links into cl.HP at close range. Not a bad combo after a close punish or a crossup j.LK, but it does require close enough proximity for cl.HP to come out.
A simple link combo. Very consistent, a solid confirm from a normal Cammy hits often.
Basic jump-in. Since jump normals push you so far back, this is sometimes all you get, though it still does more than enough damage.
Basic 2LK into SDS confirm. With most SDS combos, the level 1 version will do underwhelming damage, so stick to the level 2 or 3 versions.

A link from cl.HP into super. Yes, this is a link, and not a cancel. That makes this incredibly simple to confirm, and since Cammy can link into cl.HP from lights and hits this normal all the time, this is a very scary confirm to know.

Cammy's scary level 2 BNB. Expensive but can be worth it as it beats a level 3 SDS cleanly in damage and looks way cooler too. Any combo that ends in 236236K can also end in this. If you only wanna spend 2 bars, change the combo to be (j.HK) cl.HP, 236236MK > WHIFF j.214K, 623HK for a 6859 damage 36 stun combo instead.
